label: F2
evidence: Reynolds 2021: 'Fb2 fibroblasts are significantly enriched compared to healthy skin and have upregulated expression of the chemokines CXCL12 and CCL19' in AD and psoriasis. Fetal skin fibroblasts express more genes relating to Fb2 adult fibroblasts, including COL1A1, COL1A2 and COL6A1. F2 in Gopee 2024 corresponds to Fb2 in Reynolds 2021.
